chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-3301 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.14217/2025 3. For hearing of main case 04.09.2025 Mr. Abdul Ghani Junejo, advocate for the petitioners a/w petitioners Mr. Sandeep Malani, AAG Mr. Muhammad Noonari, APG a/w I.O Ali Bux Jalbani, PS Aqil, Larkana and PI Hameedullah PS Steel Town Karachi --------- Investigating Officer, Ali Bux Jalbani, PS Aqil, Larkana, is present in Court and states that he has recorded the 161 Cr.P.C statement of petitioner Mst. Gulshad and on the basis of that statement he undertakes to file report in ‘C’ class before the concerned Judicial Magistrate. He shall do so within 03 days of the date of this order. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms along with pending applications. Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
